name: Vornado Realty Trust Pfd Ser L %
summary: Vornado Realty Trust Pfd Ser L % represents a series of preferred stock issued by Vornado Realty Trust. These preferred shares offer a stated dividend rate and have a preference over common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution during liquidation. Vornado Realty Trust is a real estate investment trust (REIT).
